name: Python 3.12
postCreateCommand: apt-get update && apt-get install -y zip zsh git && pip install --upgrade pip && pip install -r requirements-dev.txt && sh -c "$(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh/master/tools/install.sh)" "" --unattended && git clone https://github.com/wfxr/forgit.git ${ZSH_CUSTOM:-~/.oh-my-zsh/custom}/plugins/forgit && sed -i 's/plugins=(git)/plugins=(git forgit)/' ~/.zshrc && git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/junegunn/fzf.git ~/.fzf && ~/.fzf/install --all && chsh -s /bin/zsh
